🩺 Health Tips & Preventive Care — Tamil Nadu Healthcare Guide ← All Features
MediCare+
All Features Video Consult
← All Features
🩺
Preventive Care

Health Tips & Wellness

Expert-curated health guidance from Tamil Nadu's top specialists. Stay informed, stay healthy.

Home›Features› Health Tips
❤️

Heart Health

Exercise 30 min/day, low-sodium diet, monitor BP. Annual cardiac screening after age 40. Avoid smoking. Cholesterol checks every 5 years.

Cardiologist Tip
🩸

Diabetes Care

Daily blood sugar monitoring, HbA1c every 3 months. Low-carb diet, regular exercise. Foot care is essential. Consult endocrinologist annually.

Diabetologist Tip
🧠

Mental Wellness

7–8 hours sleep, stress management through yoga/meditation. Mental health is physical health. Consult a psychiatrist without stigma.

Psychiatrist Tip
🫁

Respiratory Health

Avoid indoor/outdoor pollutants. Use masks during high AQI days. Annual chest X-rays for smokers. Spirometry tests for asthma patients.

Pulmonologist Tip
🦴

Bone & Joint Care

Calcium & Vitamin D daily. Weight-bearing exercises strengthen bones. Arthritis screening after 50. Avoid prolonged sitting.

Orthopaedic Tip
👁️

Eye Care

Annual eye checkups for diabetics. Reduce screen time, follow 20-20-20 rule. UV-protected sunglasses outdoors. Glaucoma screening after 40.

Ophthalmologist Tip
🚨

Emergency? Call 108 — Free · 24/7 · Tamil Nadu

Ambulance dispatched within 8 minutes in Chennai metro. BLS & ALS units with trained paramedics.

© 2025 MediCare+ · All Features

Prescriptions & Medications

Dr. Karthik Rajan · Diabetologist
14 Feb 2025
Metformin 500mg Glipizide 5mg Vitamin B12
Take Metformin with meals twice daily. Glipizide 30 mins before breakfast. Follow low-sugar diet. Review in 4 weeks.
Dr. Priya Nair · Cardiologist
12 Jan 2025
Atorvastatin 20mg Aspirin 75mg
Atorvastatin at night. Aspirin after breakfast. Avoid high-fat meals. ECG follow-up in 6 weeks.

Our Mission

Transforming Healthcare Across Tamil Nadu

MediCare+ was built to democratize healthcare access across all 32 Tamil Nadu districts. We connect patients in remote areas with specialist doctors in Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, and Vellore.

Our platform integrates AI diagnostics, real-time video consultation, Tamil Nadu hospital network, and role-based dashboards for patients, doctors, and administrators.

50+Hospitals
342Doctors
9,284Patients
32Districts
✅ NABH Accredited 🔒 ISO 27001 🌿 TN Govt Partner

Wellness Guide
Health Tips & Preventive Care
❤️

Heart Health

Exercise at least 30 minutes daily, maintain a low-sodium diet, and check blood pressure regularly. Annual cardiac screenings are recommended after age 40.

🩸

Diabetes Management

Monitor blood sugar levels daily. Follow a balanced diet low in refined carbs. Regular HbA1c testing every 3 months is recommended for diabetics.

🧠

Mental Wellness

Practice stress management through yoga or meditation. Get 7–8 hours of sleep. Don't hesitate to consult a psychiatrist — mental health is as important as physical health.

🦷

Dental Hygiene

Brush twice daily, floss regularly, and visit your dentist every 6 months. Poor dental health is linked to heart disease and diabetes.

🚨

Emergency: Call 108

Tamil Nadu's 108 ambulance is FREE and available 24/7. For chest pain, breathlessness, stroke symptoms, or severe injuries — call immediately.

💉

Vaccinations

Stay up-to-date on flu shots, tetanus boosters, and COVID-19 boosters. Hepatitis B and HPV vaccines are available at all government hospitals in Tamil Nadu.
